data.title: 国际服主线Vol.5 第一章前篇PV公开

data.body:
[Main Story Update Notice]

The first half of Main Story Vol. 5 Hyakkaryouran Chapter 1: "Like the Flower That Wishes to Bloom" has been revealed!

Sensei, what fate will befall the Hyakkaryouran Resolution Council...?

⬇️Promotional Video (HD)⬇️
https://youtu.be/t8dKgBn8maw
